title: Brand Configuration
description: Brand-scope configuration (brands/<brand-id>/brand.json). The brand-keyed structured-config layer (DD-10 / RD-5). One file per brand. Replaces production live-config files by generalizing their shapes; only the template ships, with NO real brand values. Spec ref: release-spec.md §11.3.

schema_version.description: Version of this config shape, for migration handling (§11.1).

id.description: Stable brand id. Matches the brands/<brand-id>/ directory name and the 'brand' key used across artifacts.

account_class.description: operator (a founder/operator-owned account, looser media strictness) vs brand (a brand/project account).

platforms.description: Per-platform publishing configuration for this brand.

cooldown_overrides.description: Per-brand override of the system cooldown defaults (§8.6). Absent means inherit system.json cooldown.

drama_dial.description: Per-brand dramatization stance consumed by the voice/style rules. The brand-DNA authoring template carries the matching preference question.

work_recap.description: OPTIONAL per-brand work-recap / build-in-public settings (release-spec §3.3). Meaningful only for account_class=operator brands (founder/operator/team accounts share the build in the open with flexible voice). CONFIG-GATED and OFF BY DEFAULT — enable the pathway in system.json work_recap; this block scopes a brand's own memory source and private-term deny list when system.json work_recap.accounts references it (or single-account mode points at this brand). PRIVACY IS LOAD-BEARING: the repo ships the MECHANISM pointed at a configured path; it NEVER bundles real memory.

enabled.description: Per-brand opt-in (still subject to the system.json work_recap.enabled master gate; both must be true). Defaults false.

memory_path.description: Path to this account's SENSITIVE memory the source scans (read-only; never copied into the repo).

files.description: Files-glob relative to memory_path. Supports an exact file and a single 'dir/*.ext' wildcard. Default ['MEMORY.md', 'memory/*.md'].

lookback_days.description: How many days back the scan considers recent work. Default 3.

private_terms.description: Per-brand private-term deny list (partner names, codenames, unreleased feature names) — PUBLIC anti-targets to NOT print, unioned with the system-level list. Never secret VALUES. Either a flat string array or a { terms, secret_literals } object.

paths.description: CONTENT_HOME-relative locations of this brand's authored assets. Absolute paths are forbidden.

corpora.description: Ingested corpora directory for this brand.

publisher.description: Which publisher adapter carries this platform for this brand.

integration_ref.description: The integration id the publisher shows in its settings for the connected account, recorded at account-connection time. For Postiz-backed lanes this is the Postiz integration id. Giphy lanes leave it null and use the Giphy credentials/username instead. Null until the account is connected (deferrable until LIVE).

handle_placeholder.description: Display handle for this account. Synthetic placeholder in shipped templates (e.g. @acmecosmos).

rate_limit_per_day.description: Maximum posts per day for this brand×platform. Enforced by the publish gate.

publish_windows.description: Allowed local-time publish windows. Outside these windows the publish gate fails unless the queue entry is marked publish-immediately. Empty/absent means no window restriction.

auto_publish.description: RD-10 auto-publish trust-state block — engine-maintained per brand×platform.

end.description: Window end, local HH:MM 24h. May be earlier than start to express a window that crosses midnight.

auto_publish_state.description: Auto-publish removes the publisher second gate for this lane (never the human approval). Entry/revocation are enforced mechanically by the engine (§15.5); operators set 'enabled', the engine maintains the rest.

enabled.description: Operator opt-in. The engine still requires the trust criteria to be met before publishing automatically.

qualifying_streak.description: Consecutive qualifying publishes on this lane (engine-maintained). Reset to 0 on revocation.

last_revocation.description: Timestamp of the most recent automatic revocation, or null.

revocation_reason.description: Reason for the most recent revocation, or null.

relative_path.description: CONTENT_HOME-relative path. Absolute paths and drive letters are forbidden.
